their commitments under treaty settlements is

source_metadata.title: 2025/08/20 - MA (Part 2)
source_metadata.description:
Wednesday 20 August 2025 | Māori Affairs Committee (Part 2) 

Briefing on Treaty settlement legislation and Report of the Controller and Auditor-General, How public organisations are fulfilling Treaty settlements   

Hearing of evidence
Submitter list:
Land Information New Zealand - Toitū Te Whenua 

Gaye Searancke, Te Tumu Whakarae/Chief Executive 
Jan Pierce, Kaihautū, Customer Delivery 
Dione Payne, Head of Māori-Crown Relations 
Sonya Wikitera, Head of Crown Property
